title: Tyler “sym” Porter cause of death: Twitch streamer and TSM Valorant pro killed during birthday trip
summary_full: Tyler Porter, a rising Valorant professional and Twitch streamer known as “sym,” tragically died in a car accident on May 5 while celebrating his 21st birthday. The former TSM player was widely respected for his viral Jett gameplay and competitive success. Fellow player Austen also reportedly died in the crash. Tributes from teammates, friends, and the esports community quickly flooded social media, remembering sym as a talented player and beloved friend with a bright future ahead.
